name: Pasta with Pine Nuts & Sun-Dried Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 12 oz Fusilli or other spiral-shaped pasta
2/3 cup Chopped drained oil-packed sun-dried tomatoes (about 3 ounces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook fusilli pasta in a large pot of boiling salted water until just tender but still firm to the bite.
2. Drain pasta well.
3. Heat 5 tablespoons olive oil in a heavy large skillet over high heat.
4. Add pasta and fry until beginning to crisp at edges, stirring frequently, about 10 minutes.
5. Transfer pasta to a large bowl.
6. Add remaining 2 tablespoons olive oil to the same skillet.
7. Add toasted pine nuts and sun-dried tomatoes and stir over high heat until just warmed through, about 1 minute.
8. Pour pine nut mixture over pasta.
9. Add chopped parsley and grated Parmesan cheese and toss to blend.
10. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
